mapper.sql: org_id, org_code, org_name, parent_id, inherited_name, inherited_id, sort_num, level_num, tel, address, deleted, created_by, created_date, last_updated_by, last_updated_date, remark
mapper.select: SELECT o.ORG_ID, o.ORG_CODE, o.ORG_NAME, o.PARENT_ID,o.INHERITED_ID,o.INHERITED_NAME,o.SORT_NUM, o.LEVEL_NUM, (select CASE COUNT(1) WHEN 0 THEN 'open' ELSE 'close' END from sys_org where DELETED = 0 AND parent_id = o.org_id) as state, o.ADDRESS,o.TEL,o.REMARK,o.CREATED_DATE, o.LAST_UPDATED_DATE, GET_REAL_NAME(o.CREATED_BY) AS CREATED_BY_NAME, GET_REAL_NAME(o.LAST_UPDATED_BY) AS LAST_UPDATED_BY_NAME FROM SYS_ORG o WHERE o.DELETED = 0 AND ORG_ID = #{orgId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}

SELECT o.DEPARTMENT_ID, o.DEPARTMENT_CODE, o.DEPARTMENT_NAME, o.PARENT_ID,o.INHERITED_ID,o.INHERITED_NAME,o.SORT_NUM, o.LEVEL_NUM, (select CASE COUNT(1) WHEN 0 THEN 'open' ELSE 'close' END from sys_department where DELETED = 0 AND parent_id = o.department_id) as state, o.ADDRESS,o.TEL,o.REMARK,o.CREATED_DATE, o.LAST_UPDATED_DATE, GET_REAL_NAME(o.CREATED_BY) AS CREATED_BY_NAME, GET_REAL_NAME(o.LAST_UPDATED_BY) AS LAST_UPDATED_BY_NAME FROM SYS_DEPARTMENT o WHERE o.DELETED = 0 AND DEPARTMENT_ID = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_org (ORG_NAME, PARENT_ID, INHERITED_ID, INHERITED_NAME, SORT_NUM, LEVEL_NUM, ADDRESS,TEL, REMARK, DELETED, CREATED_BY, CREATED_DATE,LAST_UPDATED_BY, LAST_UPDATED_DATE,ORG_CODE) VALUES (#{orgName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{parentId,jdbcType=NUMERIC},'${parentInheritedId}/${orgId}', #{inheritedName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{sortNum,jdbcType=NUMERIC},#{levelNum,jdbcType=NUMERIC},#{address,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tel,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{deleted,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{createdBy,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},#{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType=NUMERIC},#{lastUpdatedDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{orgCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_org SET INHERITED_ID = '${parentInheritedId}/${orgId}' WHERE ORG_ID = #{orgId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}

update sys_org
org_code = #{orgCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
org_name = #{orgName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
parent_id = #{parentId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
inherited_name = #{inheritedName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
inherited_id = #{inheritedId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sort_num = #{sortNum,jdbcType=INTEGER},
level_num = #{levelNum,jdbcType=INTEGER},
tel = #{tel,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
address = #{address,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
deleted = #{deleted,jdbcType=INTEGER},
created_by = #{createdBy,jdbcType=INTEGER},
created_date = #{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
last_updated_by = #{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType=INTEGER},
last_updated_date = #{lastUpdatedDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where org_id = #{orgId,jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM SYS_ORG WHERE EXISTS (select 1 from (select GET_ORG_CHILD(#{orgId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}) orgs) t where FIND_IN_SET(ORG_ID,orgs ))
mapper.select: SELECT (@i:=@i+1) as RowNum,o.ORG_ID, o.ORG_CODE, o.ORG_NAME, p.ORG_CODE P_ORG_CODE,o.ADDRESS,o.TEL,o.remark FROM (Select @i:=0) B,sys_org o left join sys_org p on (o.PARENT_ID = p.ORG_ID) WHERE o.DELETED = 0 AND FIND_IN_SET(#{orgId,jdbcType=NUMERIC},REPLACE(o.INHERITED_ID,"/",","))

SELECT o.ORG_ID, o.ORG_CODE, o.ORG_NAME,o.PARENT_ID,o.INHERITED_ID,o.INHERITED_NAME,o.SORT_NUM, o.LEVEL_NUM, (select CASE COUNT(1) WHEN 0 THEN 'open' ELSE 'close' END from sys_org where DELETED = 0 AND parent_id = o.org_id) as state, o.ADDRESS,o.TEL, o.REMARK, o.CREATED_DATE, o.LAST_UPDATED_DATE, GET_REAL_NAME(o.CREATED_BY) AS CREATED_BY_NAME, GET_REAL_NAME(o.LAST_UPDATED_BY) AS LAST_UPDATED_BY_NAME FROM SYS_ORG o WHERE o.DELETED = 0 AND PARENT_ID = #{parentId,jdbcType=NUMERIC} ORDER BY SORT_NUM ASC

SELECT o.DEPARTMENT_ID, o.DEPARTMENT_CODE, o.DEPARTMENT_NAME,o.PARENT_ID,o.INHERITED_ID,o.INHERITED_NAME,o.SORT_NUM, o.LEVEL_NUM, (select CASE COUNT(1) WHEN 0 THEN 'open' ELSE 'close' END from sys_department where DELETED = 0 AND parent_id = o.department_id) as state, o.ADDRESS,o.TEL, o.REMARK, o.CREATED_DATE, o.LAST_UPDATED_DATE, GET_REAL_NAME(o.CREATED_BY) AS CREATED_BY_NAME, GET_REAL_NAME(o.LAST_UPDATED_BY) AS LAST_UPDATED_BY_NAME FROM SYS_DEPARTMENT o WHERE o.DELETED = 0 AND PARENT_ID = #{parentId,jdbcType=NUMERIC} ORDER BY SORT_NUM ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE SYS_ORG SET ORG_NAME = #{orgName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, INHERITED_NAME = #{inheritedName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SORT_NUM = #{sortNum,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, ORG_CODE = #{orgCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ADDRESS = #{address,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TEL = #{tel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, REMARK = #{remark,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, LAST_UPDATED_BY = #{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, LAST_UPDATED_DATE = #{lastUpdatedDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} WHERE ORG_ID = #{orgId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM sys_org where ORG_NAME = #{orgName,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND PARENT_ID = #{parentId,jdbcType=NUMERIC} AND DELETED = 0
AND ORG_ID != #{orgId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM sys_org where ORG_CODE = #{orgCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and DELETED = 0
AND ORG_ID != #{orgId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_org SET LEVEL_NUM = #{levelNum,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, PARENT_ID = #{parentId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, INHERITED_ID = #{inheritedId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, INHERITED_NAME = #{inheritedName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, LAST_UPDATED_BY =#{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, LAST_UPDATED_DATE =#{lastUpdatedDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} WHERE ORG_ID = #{orgId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}
UPDATE sys_org SET SORT_NUM = #{sortNum,jdbcType=NUMERIC} WHERE ORG_ID = #{orgId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}

UPDATE sys_org SET LEVEL_NUM = #{levelNum,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, INHERITED_ID = #{inheritedId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, INHERITED_NAME = #{inheritedName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, LAST_UPDATED_BY = #{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, LAST_UPDATED_DATE = #{lastUpdatedDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} WHERE ORG_ID = #{orgId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}
mapper.select: SELECT o.ORG_ID, o.ORG_CODE, o.ORG_NAME,o.PARENT_ID,o.INHERITED_ID,o.INHERITED_NAME,o.SORT_NUM, o.LEVEL_NUM,o.ADDRESS,o.TEL, o.REMARK FROM sys_org o WHERE o.DELETED = 0 AND o.PARENT_ID = 0
SELECT max(o.SORT_NUM) FROM sys_org o WHERE o.DELETED = 0 AND PARENT_ID = #{parentId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}

SELECT
FROM SYS_ORG WHERE FIND_IN_SET(ORG_ID, GET_ORG_CHILD(#{orgId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}))
SELECT org_id,org_name FROM SYS_ORG so WHERE so.deleted = 0 and so.PARENT_ID <> 0
